positive: A vibrant, stylized cosmic fox silhouette sitting among crystalline nebula formations. The style is highly detailed linework combined with ethereal watercolor gradients, evoking bioluminescent magic. Composition is centered, featuring the fox as the main, clean silhouette against a rich, deep space background dominated by sapphire, amethyst, and neon teal accents. Strong contrast is key, making the black fox outline pop against the glowing, gradient nebula clouds. Studio lighting setup, perfect for apparel printing, vector aesthetic, maximal detail, high resolution.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, faded, monochrome, logo, copyright, messy, photographic, real life
